name: PreviewBreakpoints
visual_summary: A PreviewBreakpoints component displays a list of breakpoints with corresponding button controls. It is used when working with responsive design
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: PreviewBreakpoints
Description: A PreviewBreakpoints component displays a list of breakpoints with corresponding button controls. It is used when working with responsive design
Style: flex, rounded, border
Interactions: clickable
Tags: responsive design, breakpoints, button controls

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/PreviewBreakpoints.astro
---
interface Breakpoint {
  name: string
  width: string
}

interface Props {
  breakpoints: Breakpoint[]
  src: string
}

const { breakpoints, src } = Astro.props
---

<preview-breakpoints data-src={src} class="flex gap-1">
  {
    breakpoints.map(({ name, width }) => (
      <button
        data-breakpoint={width}
        aria-pressed={width === '100%' ? 'true' : 'false'}
        type="button"
        class="inline-flex items-center justify-center ga
